title: reStructuredText
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a reStructuredText (reST) document, the markup format used by the Python documentation ecosystem and Sphinx. reST provides directives, roles, and cross-referencing features that go beyond what Markdown offers.

## When to use
Use `media:rst;textable` when a node produces or consumes reST-formatted content, such as documentation generators targeting Sphinx, or extractors that read Python project docs. For simpler Markdown, use [Markdown Document](https://capdag.com/browse/media:md;textable).

## Notes
reStructuredText syntax is stricter than Markdown and parsers are less interchangeable. Consumers should not attempt to render reST with a Markdown renderer. The `textable` tag allows reST to flow to generic text consumers.
